name: Access to ADMIN$ Share
notes:
This rule detects access to $ADMIN share.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth
SIGMA Title: Access to ADMIN$ Share
SIGMA Description: Detects access to $ADMIN share


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5000752) Failure Audit: A network share object was accessed, (5001108) Success Audit: A network share object was accessed
when the event matches LOWER("Share Full Full Name") == 'admin$' AQL filter query
when the event matches LOWER("Subject Account Full Full Name") MATCHES '\$$' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Access to ADMIN$ Share on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5000752) Failure Audit: A network share object was accessed, (5001108) Success Audit: A network share object was accessed
AND when the event matches LOWER("Share Full Full Name") == 'admin$' AQL filter query
AND when the event matches LOWER("Subject Account Full Full Name") MATCHES '\$$' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Access to ADMIN$ Share
Event description: Detects access to $ADMIN share
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
